prompt: NGRVNG engrave, A single Xiao Long Bao sliced open along its vertical axis to reveal the internal anatomy: the pleated wheat-flour skin in cross-section showing dough thickness, the steaming pork-and-aspic filling at the core, and clear amber soup pooling at the bottom of the cavity; the dumpling rests on a small bamboo steamer disk visible in side profile. Rendered as a 1890s botanical specimen plate by Pierre-Joseph Redouté. hand-drawn ink line engraving with minimal watercolor wash. cream-colored aged paper, muted ochre / sepia / olive green tones. Single specimen centered on the page in three-quarter cutaway view, anatomical-illustration framing, plenty of negative space around the subject. no text, no labels, no typography, no captions, no annotations.
substitution_note: Botanica LoRA omitted: Civitai download endpoint returns 401 without API token. Single Engrave LoRA covers the engraving anchor; Redoute/botanical style relies on prompt.
